This is the `swear01/hapi` maintained build based on official HAPI `v0.23.3`, plus upstream `main` through [`173f855`](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/commit/173f855b73e5fc5eeb4e732e860a0040feebfb44).

## Compared with the previous maintained release (`v0.23.3.1`)

- Added the three new upstream changes published after `v0.23.3.1`:
  - More specific grouped tool summaries ([#1134](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/1134)).
  - Native tool titles preserved through ACP ([#1133](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/1133)).
  - Removed obsolete Gemini CLI launch references from documentation ([#1132](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/1132)).
- Fixed a maintained-patch integration bug where Create Session's Codex `collaborationMode` occupied the `personality` argument slot. A regression test now verifies that Plan mode is forwarded through its dedicated argument.

## Compared with the official release (`tiann/hapi v0.23.3`)

This build also includes six upstream commits newer than the official `v0.23.3` tag:

- Codex session import merge repair ([#1123](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/1123), [#1127](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/1127)).
- PWA status-bar overlay ordering ([#1124](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/1124)).
- Explicit older-history loading ([#1125](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/1125)).
- The three `#1132`–`#1134` changes listed above.

It retains these selected maintained-fork additions that are not in official `v0.23.3`:

- Codex file mentions ([#774](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/774)).
- OpenCode stall-error reporting and thinking-spinner recovery ([#869](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/869)).
- macOS Codex Desktop restart support ([#912](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/912)).
- Sidebar project-group context actions ([#955](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/955)).
- Scratchlist exit after promotion to queue ([#960](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/960)).
- Codex stale-terminal recovery ([#997](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/997)).
- Accurate Codex Fast badge display ([#1007](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/1007)).
- Codex personality controls ([#1009](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/1009)).
- Per-message mid-turn steering for Codex and Cursor ([#906](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/906)).
- Fast and Plan controls in Create Session ([#1017](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/1017)).
- Native ACP session-title synchronization ([#1028](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/1028)).
- Session-name priority in the narrow sidebar ([#1029](https://github.com/tiann/hapi/pull/1029)).

## Maintained-fork guarantees

- Release tags must point to commits contained in `main`.
- macOS binaries are signed with the stable `xyz.hapi.cli` identity.
- Fork builds do not publish over upstream GitHub Pages.
- The app shell is served with no-store cache headers.
